scripts.build: npm run build -w @mvp/shared && npm run build -w @mvp/backend && npm run build -w @mvp/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @mvp/shared && concurrently -n shared,be,fe -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @mvp/shared" "npm run dev -w @mvp/backend" "npm run dev -w @mvp/frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build -w @mvp/shared && concurrently -n shared,be -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @mvp/shared" "npm run dev -w @mvp/backend"
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build -w @mvp/shared && concurrently -n shared,fe -c blue,yellow "npm run dev -w @mvp/shared" "npm run dev -w @mvp/frontend"
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @mvp/shared && npm run build -w @mvp/backend
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:drop && npm run db:create && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
